differential_diagnoses: Legionella pneumophila pneumonia with severe rhabdomyolysis
Streptococcus pneumoniae pneumonia with sepsis-associated rhabdomyolysis
Toxic myopathy secondary to herbal supplements (e.g., burdock root adulteration)
next_steps: Urgent hemodialysis for severe acute kidney injury, hyperkalemia, and acidosis
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for respiratory pathogen PCR and culture
Serum creatine kinase isoenzyme and myoglobin evaluation
Autoimmune myositis panel (e.g., anti-SRP, anti-HMGCR, Jo-1)
Consider infectious disease and rheumatology consultation
